message:
feat(tools): add LLM stub mode, identity resource, tool metrics reset, and public search types

LLM module:
- Add LLM stub mode (MCP_AGENT_MAIL_LLM_STUB env var) returning
  deterministic JSON for conformance testing — detects digest vs
  single-thread summarization by inspecting prompt content
- Import ThreadEntry, TopMention from search module for type reuse

Metrics module:
- Add reset_tool_metrics() to clear global metrics registry, enabling
  deterministic assertions in conformance tests
- Re-export from crate root

Resources module:
- New resource://identity/{project_slug} handler providing agent
  identity information including git toplevel and common dir
- Expanded resource listing

Search module:
- Make ThreadEntry and TopMention public types for cross-crate use

Macros module:
- Expanded macro_prepare_thread for LLM mode support

Products module:
- Expanded product tool handlers for LLM mode

Messaging module:
- WriteOp::MailMessage now includes extra_paths field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
